qa_pairs.question: What is GNU Screen?
qa_pairs.answer: GNU Screen is a widely used terminal multiplexer program.

qa_pairs.question: How do I create a new detached terminal session using GNU Screen?
qa_pairs.answer: You can create a new detached terminal session using the command `screen -S <session name>`.

qa_pairs.question: Why should I give my GNU Screen sessions descriptive names?
qa_pairs.answer: It's a good idea to give descriptive names to your terminal sessions to make them easier to identify later.

qa_pairs.question: What command do I use to list my detached GNU Screen sessions?
qa_pairs.answer: You can use the command `screen -list` to see a list of your detached terminal sessions on the current node.

qa_pairs.question: How can I reattach to an existing GNU Screen session?
qa_pairs.answer: You can reattach to one of your sessions using the command `screen -d -r <session name>`.
